prestazioni: BMW S70/2 GTR-spec 6.1L V12 engine: Replace the stock titanium connecting rods with Carrillo H-beam forged rods (P/N: 70212) rated for 1,200+ hp, paired with Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (P/N: 60120) featuring a 13.5:1 compression ratio and Grafal-coated skirts for reduced friction. Upgrade the stock crankshaft with a billet steel unit from Callies (P/N: 70200) with 86mm stroke and 105mm main journals for increased rigidity.

Forced induction: Install a custom-built twin-turbo system using Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos (P/N: 776318-5004S) with 76mm compressor wheels and 88mm turbine wheels, paired with Tial MV-R 60mm wastegates (P/N: MVR-60) and a custom 4-inch titanium exhaust system by Akrapovič (P/N: 1475-1400) featuring 304 stainless steel headers and a straight-pipe design with dual 120mm outlets. The intercooler system is a custom air-to-water unit by PWR (P/N: PWI1000) with a 4.5L capacity and dual Bosch 12V pumps (P/N: 0 392 022 014).

Drivetrain and suspension: Replace the stock 6-speed transverse gearbox with a Hewland NLT sequential transmission (P/N: NLT-600) featuring a magnesium casing, straight-cut gears, and a 3-plate carbon clutch from Sachs Performance (P/N: 3000 950 030). The rear differential is upgraded to a Quaife ATB helical LSD (P/N: QDF7J) with a 4.2:1 final drive ratio. Suspension is fully rebuilt with Öhlins TTX40 4-way adjustable coilovers (P/N: TTX40-1200) featuring 25mm diameter pistons, 300mm stroke, and spherical bearings at all mounting points. The front and rear anti-roll bars are replaced with adjustable units from Eibach (P/N: 20-20-010 for front, 20-20-011 for rear) with 22mm and 24mm diameters respectively.
estetica: Aerodynamics: Install the original 1997 Le Mans-spec carbon fiber longtail body kit (P/N: MCL-F1GTR-LT-001) featuring a 120mm extended rear overhang, a revised front splitter with integrated dive planes, and a massive rear diffuser with 3 vertical strakes. The rear wing is upgraded to the 1997 Le Mans-spec unit (P/N: MCL-F1GTR-WING-002) with a 1,200mm span, 300mm chord, and adjustable angle of attack (0-15 degrees). Side skirts are replaced with the GTR-spec units (P/N: MCL-F1GTR-SKIRT-001) featuring integrated NACA ducts for brake cooling.

Wheels and tires: Fit OZ Racing Ultra Leggera III wheels (P/N: UL3-1890-3P) in 18x11 front (ET15) and 18x13 rear (ET5) sizes, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (P/N: 315/30 ZR18 front, 345/35 ZR18 rear). The wheels feature a 3-piece construction with titanium bolts and center-lock hubs. Brake calipers are upgraded to AP Racing CP9440 6-piston front (P/N: CP9440-1D) and 4-piston rear (P/N: CP9441-1D) units with 380mm and 355mm two-piece floating rotors respectively, featuring directional vane cooling and titanium retention pins.

Interior and details: Replace the stock carbon fiber seats with Sparco Pro 2000 FIA-approved racing seats (P/N: 00797NR) featuring 6-point harness slots and adjustable lumbar support. The steering wheel is upgraded to a MOMO Prototipo EVO (P/N: 010120) with a 320mm diameter, Alcantara grip, and integrated quick-release hub. The dashboard is replaced with a digital unit from Motec (P/N: C127) featuring a 7-inch color display, GPS lap timing, and CAN bus integration for real-time telemetry. Exterior lighting is upgraded to Hella Rallye 3000 driving lamps (P/N: 1NA 007 699-001) with 100W bulbs and custom carbon fiber mounts.
